data.title: Crypto Crash Coming! Altcoins to Drop 50–80%, Bitcoin to Face 45% Crash
data.description:
Bitcoin has dropped to $103,000, down 1. 1%. Major altcoins like Ethereum, Solana, and XRP are also down by up to 3%, while memecoins such as Dogecoin, Litecoin, and others continue to slide
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/crypto-crash-coming-altcoins-to-drop-50-80-bitcoin-to-face-45-crash/

data.title: Singapore police arrested a suspect in a virtual currency fraud case involving about 130 SGD
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A woman is suspected of falling into a cryptocurrency investment scam and has handed over more than 1.3 million yuan to a 23-year-old man since May. After receiving the report, the Singapore Police Force quickly launched an investigation and arrested the man at Woodlands Checkpoint on Friday (June 20) before he tried to leave the country. The police revealed that the man involved, Chen Jiahao (transliteration), was charged with a charge of violating the Computer Misuse Act on Saturday morning and was remanded in custody pending investigation, during which time he may be taken out for investigation. According to the Computer Misuse Act, if convicted of using the bank system without permission, the offender may face a fine of up to 5,000 yuan, up to two years in prison, or both. The man is also under investigation for suspected fraudulent behavior, and the investigation is still ongoing. (Lianhe Zaobao)

data.title: Paradigm has liquidated 70 million LDOs, making a profit of $28.13 million in four years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Paradigm liquidated 70 million LDOs and made a profit of 28.13 million US dollars in a four-year cycle. Paradigm transferred out the last 10 million LDOs (US$7.42 million) it held 10 hours ago, and these LDOs will continue to flow into multiple CEXs in the next few days. Paradigm purchased 70 million LDOs from the Lido Treasury OTC at a price of US$0.76 four years ago. In November last year, 50 million LDOs were sold at an average price of US$1.31, and 20 million LDOs were sold at an average price of US$0.79 in the past 11 days. The average price of the transfer is US$1.16, which means that they have made a profit of approximately US$28.13 million on this LDO investment.

data.title: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino Expresses Strong Support for Bitcoin
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino recently shared his views on Bitcoin during an interview with CNBC. Ardoino expressed his admiration for Bitcoin, distinguishing it from other cryptocurrencies and likening it to 'new gold.'

data.title: Singapore Woman Allegedly Defrauded in Cryptocurrency Investment Scam
data.description:
According to PANews, a woman in Singapore has reportedly fallen victim to a cryptocurrency investment scam, handing over more than 1.3 million Singapore dollars (approximately 1.01 million USD) to a 23-year-old man since May 2025. Singapore police launched an investigation after receiving a report and arrested the man at the Woodlands Checkpoint on June 20, as he attempted to leave the country.

The police statement revealed that authorities were alerted by a bank when a woman was stopped by bank staff while trying to withdraw a large sum of money. The staff suspected she might be involved in a scam. Upon investigation, the police discovered that the woman might be a victim of a cryptocurrency investment fraud. Preliminary findings indicated that before police intervention, she had withdrawn over 300,000 Singapore dollars from another bank branch and handed it to the man in exchange for cryptocurrency. Since May 2025, the woman has reportedly given the man more than 1.3 million Singapore dollars.
